message:
feat(wasm): add virtual filesystem and Emscripten host import surface

Major expansion of the WASM bridge to support Emscripten-style modules
(e.g., the DOOM overlay fixture):

- Add WasmHostData fields for staged virtual files, open file descriptors,
  next_fd counter, and monotonic start time for emscripten_get_now
- Introduce VirtualFileHandle struct for tracking open file positions
- Add staged_files HashMap to WasmBridgeState for JS→host file staging
- Support Uint8Array extraction in extract_bytes via as_typed_array<u8>
- Virtual filesystem operations enable WASM modules that expect a host
  filesystem to read pre-staged files through synthetic file descriptors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
